title: Phantom Utilities
description: Create invisible item frames and hide vanilla signs with Phantom Membranes, without losing displayed items or text.
body:
**Phantom Utilities** is a lightweight utility mod that enhances building and decoration by making normally visible elements disappear — without losing their functionality.

### Main Features

**Clear Item Frames**

Craft invisible item frames using Phantom Membranes.  
The frame becomes invisible once an item is placed inside, leaving only the displayed item visible.

**Invisible Vanilla Signs**

Right-click any vanilla sign with a Phantom Membrane to toggle its invisibility.  
The sign model disappears while the text remains fully visible in the world.

### Why Phantom Membranes?

Phantom Membranes are often underused in vanilla Minecraft.  
This mod gives them a meaningful utility focused on clean, immersive builds.

### Designed to Feel Vanilla

*   Works seamlessly with existing item frames and signs
*   No custom GUIs or complex configuration
*   Simple interactions that feel natural in survival and creative mode
